basic_details.job_title: CAU Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Central Agricultural University (CAU) has officially announced a Walk-in Interview for the recruitment of 1 Junior Research Fellow Posts. This walk-in drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for research jobs. Candidates with M.Tech. /M.E. in or M. Sc. in relevant subjects /Livestock Product Technology or any relevant specialization with NET qualifications or any other DST, DBT, DAE, DOS, DRDO, MOE, ICAR, ICMR, IIT, IISc, IISER, NISER etc. qualification can directly attend the interview on 25-06-2026.

age_limit.age_details: Max 28 years (Relaxable by 5 years for SC/ST, PH, Women, OBC)
age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST, Physically Handicapped, Women, and OBC candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech. /M.E. or M. Sc. with NET
qualification.details: M.Tech. /M.E. in Food Process Engineering/ Agricultural Processing/Processing and Food Engineering/Food Process Engineering/Dairy and Food Engineering/Dairy & Food Technology and Food Technology or any other relevant specialization related to Food Engineering and Food Technology. M. Sc. in relevant subjects /Livestock Product Technology or any relevant specialization with NET qualifications or any other DST, DBT, DAE, DOS, DRDO, MOE, ICAR, ICMR, IIT, IISc, IISER, NISER etc. Preference will be given to the candidate having the experience of processing, product development and analysis of dairy and food products, knowledge of creation and analysis of 3D drawings.

salary_details.pay_scale: ₹37,000/- per month plus HRA (1st 2 years), ₹42,000/- per month plus HRA (after 2 years)
salary_details.details: ₹37,000/- per month plus HRA as applicable for the first two years. ₹42,000/- per month plus HRA as applicable after satisfactory performance of 2 years.

all_official_links.label: Download CAU Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the CAU recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the Central Agricultural University (CAU) recruitment is Junior Research Fellow (JRF).

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have M.Tech. /M.E. or M. Sc. with NET qualifications in relevant fields.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 28 years, with relaxations applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The salary is ₹37,000/- per month plus HRA for the first two years, and ₹42,000/- per month plus HRA thereafter.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in.

faq.question: Q7. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled for 27th June 2026.

faq.question: Q8. What is the last date to submit the application/bio-data?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the bio-data via email is 25th June 2026.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the venue for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: The venue is the office of the undersigned at Central Agricultural University, Gangtok, Sikkim - 737135.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should candidates carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry their bio-data, attested copies of all certificates, mark sheets, and original documents for verification.
